finding: Matrix Factorization outperforms NCF (HR@10 0.64 vs 0.60), consistent with Dacrema et al. 2019.

full_catalog_reference.note: Same models, full-catalog ranking; ~20x lower. Protocol must be stated.

note: Real run, reproduce with: python3 scripts/evaluate_models.py --interactions data/processed/interactions.csv --epochs 20 --protocol sampled. See docs/results.md.
